localizedDescriptions.en: Translate App Store release notes and descriptions into Chinese via system Translation (iOS 18+) or Scripting AI Assistant. Share an App Store URL to open.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 将 App Store 更新说明与应用描述翻译为中文。支持 iOS 系统翻译（iOS 18+）与 Scripting AI 助手。通过分享 App Store 链接打开。

name: App Store翻译
description: Translate App Store release notes and descriptions into Chinese via system Translation (iOS 18+) or Scripting AI Assistant. Share an App Store URL to open.
